title: hieracium murorum subsp. papillosum
intro: Hieracium murorum subsp. papillosum, also known as wall hawk's beard, is a perennial plant that belongs to the dandelion family and is native to Europe. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for treating digestive issues and skin conditions, due to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving gut health, and supporting the immune system. Hieracium murorum subsp. papillosum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to alleviate symptoms of digestive disorders and skin irritations.
